title: safety.viz shift-plot data contract
description: Long-format results data: one record per participant per visit per measure (SSP-DATA-001). Column names are supplied by the settings mapping; the shift plot pairs each participant's baseline-visit value against their comparison-visit value for the selected measure, removes missing/non-numeric results with a reported count (SSP-REG-020), and degrades gracefully when optional columns are absent (SSP-DATA-003).

data.description: d3.csv()-style records; every row carries the measure, visit, and result columns named in settings.

settings.description: Column mappings and rendering options; merged onto the module's DEFAULT_SETTINGS, so only overrides need to be supplied.

measure_col.description: Column holding the measure name; required in data.

value_col.description: Column holding the numeric result; required in data.

visit_col.description: Column holding the visit label; required in data. Its distinct values populate the baseline and comparison visit controls.

visit_order_col.description: Optional numeric column that orders the visits; when absent the visits sort alphanumerically (SSP-REG-013/014).

id_col.description: Optional participant identifier column; drives the participant counts and the default listing's first column.

unit_col.description: Optional unit column, appended to measure labels.

baseline_visits.description: Optional baseline visit(s) selected on first render; defaults to the first visit (SSP-CFG-004).

comparison_visits.description: Optional comparison visit(s) selected on first render; defaults to every visit after the baseline (SSP-CFG-005).

baseline_stat.description: Summary statistic applied when a participant has several results across the baseline visit(s).

comparison_stat.description: Summary statistic applied when a participant has several results across the comparison visit(s).

filters.description: Optional filter columns rendered as controls (SSP-CFG-006).

details.description: Optional listing columns; defaults to participant ID, baseline, comparison, change, and percent change (SSP-REQ-005).
